features.description: Plugins in .claude/skills directories now auto-load without a marketplace, changing plugin discovery behavior.
features.reference_changelog_line: Plugins in `.claude/skills` directories are now automatically loaded, no marketplace required

features.description: EnterWorktree can now switch between Claude-managed worktrees mid-session, expanding tool behavior.
features.reference_changelog_line: `EnterWorktree` can now switch between Claude-managed worktrees mid-session

features.description: Claude-managed worktrees are now left unlocked when the agent finishes, allowing git worktree remove/prune cleanup.
features.reference_changelog_line: Worktrees managed by Claude are now left unlocked when the agent finishes, so `git worktree remove`/`prune` can clean them up

features.description: Backspace after a workflow trigger keyword now dismisses the workflow request instead of deleting a character.
features.reference_changelog_line: Pressing backspace right after a workflow trigger keyword now dismisses the workflow request (same as alt+w) instead of deleting a character

features.description: New `claude plugin init <name>` command scaffolds a new plugin in .claude/skills.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `claude plugin init <name>` to scaffold a new plugin in `.claude/skills`

features.description: claude agents now honors the `agent` field in settings.json with a `--agent <name>` override flag.
features.reference_changelog_line: `claude agents`: the `agent` field in `settings.json` is now honored for dispatched sessions, with `--agent <name>` to override it

features.description: The 'bash commands will be sandboxed' startup banner was removed; sandbox status still shown in /status.
features.reference_changelog_line: Removed the "bash commands will be sandboxed" startup banner — sandbox status still shows in `/status` and when a command is blocked

features.description: tool_decision telemetry events now include tool_parameters when OTEL_LOG_TOOL_DETAILS=1 is set.
features.reference_changelog_line: `tool_decision` telemetry events now include `tool_parameters` (bash commands, MCP/skill names) when `OTEL_LOG_TOOL_DETAILS=1`

features.description: Autocomplete added for /plugin arguments including subcommands, installed plugin names, and marketplace plugins.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added autocomplete for `/plugin` arguments: subcommands, installed plugin names, and plugins from known marketplaces

features.description: New 'Workflow keyword trigger' setting in /config to disable the word 'workflow' from triggering dynamic workflows.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added a "Workflow keyword trigger" setting in /config to stop the word "workflow" in a prompt from triggering a dynamic workflow

features.description: claude agents slash-command autocomplete in dispatch input now matches substrings.
features.reference_changelog_line: `claude agents`: slash-command autocomplete in the dispatch input now matches substrings

features.description: Auto mode now available on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry for Opus 4.7/4.8 via CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AUTO_MODE=1 opt-in.
features.reference_changelog_line: Auto mode is now available on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry for Opus 4.7 and Opus 4.8. Opt in by setting `CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AUTO_MODE=1`
